title: enicostema axillare
intro: Enicostema axillare, also known as velvet-leaved Strobilanthes or velvet leaf, is a flowering plant species native to the Western Ghats of India and Sri Lanka. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Enicostema axillare include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antiseptic, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Enicostema axillare can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or powder, and is often used to treat various health conditions, including colds, coughs, and skin infections.
